mapper.select: SELECT d.day_id, d.day_number, TO_CHAR(d.trip_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS trip_date, d.memo AS day_memo, i.item_id, i.visit_order, i.start_time, i.end_time, i.memo, p.trip_place_id, p.place_name, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.category_name FROM trip_day d LEFT JOIN itinerary_item i ON i.day_id = d.day_id LEFT JOIN trip_place p ON p.trip_place_id = i.trip_place_id WHERE d.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY d.day_number ASC, i.visit_order ASC

SELECT trip_place_id, member_id, api_place_id, place_name, address, latitude, longitude, category_name, place_url FROM trip_place WHERE (member_id IS NULL OR member_id = #{currentMemberId})
AND place_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND category_name = #{category}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN member_id = #{currentMemberId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, place_name FETCH FIRST 30 ROWS ONLY

SELECT DISTINCT p.trip_place_id, p.place_name, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.category_name, p.address FROM trip t JOIN trip_day d ON d.trip_id = t.trip_id JOIN itinerary_item i ON i.day_id = d.day_id JOIN trip_place p ON p.trip_place_id = i.trip_place_id WHERE t.trip_id = #{tripId} AND t.is_public = 1

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(e.amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT m.member_id), 0), 0) AS avgPerPerson FROM expense e JOIN trip_member m ON m.trip_id = e.trip_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND m.invitation_status = 'ACCEPTED'
SELECT category, SUM(amount) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS count FROM expense WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} GROUP BY category ORDER BY totalAmount DESC

SELECT e.expense_id, e.description, e.amount, e.category, TO_CHAR(e.expense_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS expenseDate, e.payment_type, m.nickname AS payerNickname, ep.share_amount, ep.is_settled FROM expense e JOIN member m ON m.member_id = e.payer_id JOIN expense_participant ep ON ep.expense_id = e.expense_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND ep.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY e.expense_date DESC

SELECT DISTINCT p.trip_place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, p.category_name AS category, p.address AS address, p.latitude AS latitude, p.longitude AS longitude, p.place_url AS placeUrl FROM trip_place p
JOIN place_tag pt ON p.trip_place_id = pt.place_id JOIN tag t ON pt.tag_id = t.tag_id
WHERE (p.member_id IS NULL OR p.member_id = #{currentMemberId})
AND p.category_name = #{categoryName}
AND t.tag_name IN
#{tagName}
ORDER BY p.place_name FETCH FIRST 30 ROWS ONLY

SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, place_name AS placeName, category_name AS category, address AS address, latitude AS latitude, longitude AS longitude, place_url AS placeUrl FROM trip_place WHERE (member_id IS NULL OR member_id = #{currentMemberId}) AND (place_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR address LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY place_name FETCH FIRST 30 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TRIP_PLACE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO trip_place ( trip_place_id, member_id, api_place_id, place_name, address, latitude, longitude, category_name, place_url, created_at ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, #{memberId}, #{apiContentId}, #{placeName}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{category}, #{imageUrl}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT trip_place_id FROM trip_place WHERE api_place_id = #{apiContentId} AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, member_id AS memberId, place_name AS placeName, address, latitude, longitude, category_name AS category, place_url AS imageUrl, api_place_id AS apiContentId, CASE WHEN member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isCustom FROM trip_place WHERE (member_id IS NULL OR member_id = #{currentMemberId}) AND ( UPPER(place_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(address) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN member_id = #{currentMemberId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, place_name FETCH FIRST 30 ROWS ONLY

SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, member_id AS memberId, place_name AS placeName, address, latitude, longitude, category_name AS category, place_url AS imageUrl, 1 AS isCustom FROM trip_place WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT trip_place_id AS placeId, member_id AS memberId, place_name AS placeName, address, latitude, longitude, category_name AS category, place_url AS imageUrl, api_place_id AS apiContentId, CASE WHEN member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isCustom FROM trip_place WHERE trip_place_id = #{placeId} AND (member_id IS NULL OR member_id = #{currentMemberId})
